title: SSP SAIL Specialist Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Salem Steel Plant, Steel Authority of India Limited
short_info: The Steel Authority of India Limited (SSP SAIL) has officially announced the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 18-05-2026 at SAIL Official Website. Candidates who meet the maximum age criteria of 69 years and hold M.B.B.S and M.D qualifications can now attend the walk-in interview on 01-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply for the walk-in process are shared below.
selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Medical Screening

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SSP SAIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) post at Salem Steel Plant, Steel Authority of India Limited is scheduled for 01 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name and number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Specialist Doctor (General Medicine), with a total of 1 vacancy available. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.B.B.S degree along with an M.D. qualification to be eligible for the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this position is 69 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 160000 per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview, followed by Document Verification and Medical Screening of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Salem Steel Plant, Steel Authority of India Limited, located in Salem, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contract basis for the Specialist Doctor (General Medicine) position.
